name: osint_web
summary: The Twitter handle @Aziffo (a confirmed identifier for the subject) belongs to a Spanish-speaking individual with a technical/developer orientation, whose bio references 'multithreading' and 'debugging.' The same handle 'Aziffo' appears on GitHub (user ID 54035051), where the account opened issues on the alacritty terminal emulator project, indicating use of Linux (Arch) on a laptop. No public content directly linking the email mateoamadoares@gmail.com to any indexed social profile was found. A LinkedIn profile for an 'Angel Otero' at PriceSmart (Universidad Tecnológica de Panamá graduate, IT/software background, Spanish-language posts) is a plausible but unconfirmed match.

facts.claim: GitHub handle Aziffo (user ID 54035051) filed issues on the alacritty/alacritty repository in May 2021, December 2021, and April 2023, all using Linux (Arch).
Twitter @Aziffo had 41 followers, 268 following, and 137 tweets at time of last indexed data, with a Spanish-language developer bio.

signals.notes: Twitter bio reads 'gozando el multithreading del día a día y intentando debuguear algo' — Spanish, technical/coding focus
GitHub user Aziffo reported using Linux Arch on a laptop with alacritty terminal emulator
Multiple GitHub issues filed about developer tooling (alacritty, polybar) indicating active software development practice
LinkedIn profile for Angel Otero at PriceSmart; education from Universidad Tecnológica de Panamá. Cannot confirm this is the same individual without a link to @Aziffo or provided email
Education listed on possibly-matching LinkedIn profile; unconfirmed as subject
